Meeting Archaeologist
Conflict registry

Contradictions

Decisions that conflict with earlier rulings on the same topic. Burgundy markers indicate decisions that reverse a prior commitment.

HIGHcloud_strategy→ Cloud Strategy
Detected May 9, 2026
Earlier · meeting_05_cloud_strategy

Decided to use ECS with Fargate for deployment, explicitly rejecting Kubernetes.

Later · meeting_10_infra_2026

The team decided to move to a multi-cloud architecture, specifically AWS plus GCP, using Kubernetes as the deployment abstraction, with the target of GCP Frankfurt being live by end of Q1 2026.

Prior decision [1] explicitly decided to use ECS with Fargate for deployment and rejected Kubernetes. The new decision to use Kubernetes as the deployment abstraction directly contradicts this prior decision.
HIGHcloud_strategy→ Cloud Strategy
Detected May 9, 2026
Earlier · meeting_05_cloud_strategy

Adopted a single-cloud strategy on AWS, rejecting multi-cloud and GCP, and committing to AWS-native services (RDS, ECS, S3, CloudFront).

Later · meeting_10_infra_2026

The team decided to move to a multi-cloud architecture, specifically AWS plus GCP, using Kubernetes as the deployment abstraction, with the target of GCP Frankfurt being live by end of Q1 2026.

Prior decision [0] explicitly adopted a single-cloud AWS strategy and rejected multi-cloud and GCP. The new decision to move to a multi-cloud architecture with AWS plus GCP directly contradicts this prior commitment.
